transcript: Alright, Alan in Golden, you're on KBIG radio. Couple of open lines, 607-29...
I suppose the voice of reason threw him off?
I wanted to talk to you a little bit about Gugliotta this afternoon.
Now, how did you... how did you guys feel about when Gugliotta intercepted that bladder, the other day?
Wh... wh... I'm sorry, what did you say now?
We... what are we talking about here?
Yeah, he intercepted that spleen or something, or...?
You're, you're... uh, you've left us in the dark. Better... give this guy what he's got comin'. The real thing.
[laughing] Gugliotta... that guy! Ahh, I'll tell you! You know what? I think he's had some Kentucky Tavern. That hasn't been on the market...
You're not... we can't say that.
Okay, I'll say Calvert's instead. I'm sorry, I apologize...
